name: Bello Floor Lamp - FLL4078 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the refined elegance of the Bello 64.5 inch floor lamp. Crafted with a sleek black iron frame and a smooth mdf base, this floor lamp effortlessly blends style with functionality. Its minimalist design makes it a versatile addition to any room, perfect for creating a cozy reading nook or adding a touch of sophistication to your living area. The black finish complements various decor styles, ensuring it enhances the ambiance without overwhelming the space. Whether placed beside a favorite chair or used to brighten a dim corner, Bello offers a practical lighting solution with a contemporary edge. Let this striking lamp be the finishing touch to your interior, providing both form and light exactly where you need it. Experience the art of modern lighting with Bello.
